{{Quote|We were attacked by a squadron of X-wing fighters, sir. We destroyed them, but we took damaging fire.|Kameda reporting to Tarkin|<ref name="Death Star (novel)" />}}
'''Kameda''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under the command [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Death Star (novel)" />

Following an [[Attack on the first Death Star|ambush]] by members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], it was Kameda's duty to inform [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] that Daala had been injured during the battle.<ref name="Death Star (novel)" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}} {{Voice}}
